questions.title: Scaled Dot-Product Attention
questions.description: Implement scaled dot-product attention: Attention(Q, K, V) = softmax(Q @ K^T / sqrt(d_k)) @ V.

questions.title: Multi-Head Attention (PyTorch)
questions.description: Use PyTorch's built-in MultiheadAttention. Model dim=512, 8 attention heads.

blanks.hint: Layer normalization over the model dimension.
